cliMeter
  • GitHub
  • Releases
OpenAI Codex + Anthropic Claude

Know your limits
before they stop you.

macOS menu bar app that tracks Claude Code and Codex usage limits in real time. Session and weekly windows at a glance.

$ brew install bezlant/tap/climeter

or download from GitHub

🌿 Off-peak peak in 6h 32m
Claude Personal
CLI
Anthropic
Session
✓ 42% · 2h 51m
Week
⚠ 67% · 3d 8h
Codex
OpenAI
Session
✓ 18% · 4h 12m
Week
✓ 41% · 5d 3h
⚙
↻ ⏻

Claude and Codex, separated clearly.

Features

Claude profiles

Manage multiple Claude subscriptions and switch between them from the menu bar.

Claude auto-switch

Hits 95%? Automatically rotates to your next Claude account. No interruptions.

Codex limits

Tracks OpenAI Codex session and weekly usage from your Codex CLI login.

Peak hours

Shows when Claude rate limits are tighter. Countdown and local-time conversion built in.

Per-provider toggles

Show or hide Claude and Codex independently. File-based credential storage available.

Private

No analytics, no telemetry. Only talks to Anthropic and OpenAI usage endpoints.

Built by Anthony · MIT License · Native Swift for OpenAI and Anthropic usage
